response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with ~13 years of experience, but the role requires a Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows only recent, light exposure to AI/agent tooling (MCP code generators since April 2025) and no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or strategic leadership at the scale required. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage rather than platform-level strategy, and there is no evidence of advising strategic customers or driving org-wide technical direction.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow tooling
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) with community teaching and open-source leadership via GISCollective
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms at the recognized-expert level the role demands
Experience level (~13 years, Senior/Staff IC) is below the Director-level Principal Engineer bar with 15 years required
Limited evidence of cloud platform strategy, customer/partner advisory work, or influencing technical direction beyond individual teams

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
Seniority gap vs Director-level Principal IC role
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
